metadata.defaultTitle: CasaClaro | Colombia Property, Rentals & Relocation Intelligence
metadata.defaultDescription: Bilingual Colombia property and relocation platform for buyers, renters, sellers, expatriates, retirees, brokers, and families. Compare cities, neighborhoods, and vetted listings — and move from research into practical local action.

listings.title: Current Listings | CasaClaro Colombia
listings.description: Browse vetted Colombia property listings for sale and rent across Medellín, Bogotá, Cartagena, and more — each reviewed for title clarity, legal standing, and market value.

listings.pageSubtitle: Vetted properties across Colombia — reviewed for title clarity, legal standing, and market value.

emptyState.bodyFiltered: Adjust your filters above, or reset to see all available properties.
emptyState.bodyEmpty: New vetted properties are added regularly across Medellín, Bogotá, Cartagena, and Colombia's top relocation cities.

listings.syntheticBanner: Development data — these listings are synthetic and do not represent real properties for sale or rent.

fullyVetted.label: Fully Vetted
fullyVetted.tooltip: Title is clear, documents legally reviewed, property physically inspected, and HOA rules confirmed by a CasaClaro professional.

professionalReview.label: Professional Review
professionalReview.tooltip: A licensed professional has reviewed key documents. Full physical inspection and vetting is in progress or partially complete.

basic.label: Basic
basic.tooltip: This listing has passed a completeness review. Legal and physical vetting are not yet included — review all documentation independently before proceeding.

footer.tagline: Read Colombia clearly. Buy, rent, move, or list with real context.
